calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Off Calendar

Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Caroline McCormick, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-1, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S)
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALYSSA FOX.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,132.30
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $697.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,829.80
Judgment signed in open court.
